mapper.select: SELECT id, images, name, team, position FROM star WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, images, name, team, position, detailIntro FROM star WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO star ( images, name, team, position, detailIntro, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{images}, #{name}, #{team}, #{position}, #{detailIntro}, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(), UNIX_TIMESTAMP(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE star SET images = #{images}, name = #{name}, team = #{team}, position = #{position}, detailIntro = #{detailIntro}, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE star SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
